commit.subject: LU-19488 tests: FORCE_LARGE_NID on remote env
commit.message:
LU-19488 tests: FORCE_LARGE_NID on remote env

In do_nodes, we need to export some variables to be able to have them
from remote nodes. FORCE_LARGE_NID was added into the list of
variables exported by get_env_vars.
Autotest does not suffer from this issue. It seems env variables are
outside test-framework.sh. Thus, no special test is needed to check
this patch.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I38581d8ecccae0efad3807345fcd002cb341fa0c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61871
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Manish Regmi <mregmi@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
